# DecisionMemory Protocol

> Platform-agnostic AI decision-making memory system with Outcome-Weighted Memory (OWM) architecture via MCP. Accepts standardized decision data from any source (MT5, Binance, Alpaca) and provides structured memory with LLM-powered reflection.

DecisionMemory Protocol is an open-source memory layer for AI-assisted decision-making systems. It does NOT connect to decision-making platforms directly — it accepts standardized decision data and organizes it into three layers:

- L1 (Raw Decisions): Every decision recorded automatically with full metadata
- L2 (Patterns): AI discovers what works and what doesn't across decision history
- L3 (Strategy): Memory becomes judgment — adaptive risk and strategy refinement

Key capabilities:
- 4 MCP tools: store_decision, recall_decisions, get_performance, run_reflection
- LLM-powered reflection engine (Claude API) for decision analysis
- Adaptive risk management based on historical memory
- Platform-agnostic: works with MT5, Binance, Alpaca, or any decision-making platform
- MT5 auto-sync via mt5_sync.py (polls every 60 seconds)

## Install

### Claude Desktop
Add to claude_desktop_config.json:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "decisionmemory": {
      "command": "uvx",
      "args": ["decisionmemory-protocol"]
    }
  }
}

### Claude Code
claude mcp add decisionmemory -- uvx decisionmemory-protocol

### pip
pip install decisionmemory-protocol

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/mnemox-ai/decisionmemory-protocol#readme): Full documentation with architecture diagrams.
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/decisionmemory-protocol/): Install via `pip install decisionmemory-protocol`.
- [Quick Start](https://github.com/mnemox-ai/decisionmemory-protocol#quick-start): Multiple installation methods (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, source, Docker).

## MCP Tools

- store_decision: Record a decision with standardized schema (symbol, direction, lots, entry/exit price, outcome)
- recall_decisions: Query decision history with filters (symbol, date range, strategy)
- get_performance: Calculate performance metrics (win rate, profit factor, drawdown)
- run_reflection: Trigger LLM-powered analysis of recent decisions

## Optional

- [MT5 Setup Guide](https://github.com/mnemox-ai/decisionmemory-protocol#connect-to-mt5): How to connect MetaDecision-Maker 5 for automatic decision syncing.
- [Dashboard](https://github.com/mnemox-ai/decisionmemory-protocol#dashboard): Streamlit-based monitoring dashboard.
